programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: Lindsey Kurowski takes her expertise to Guerneville, CA to help the owner of a rustic cabin motel that hasn't been updated in decades; she'll create an overall aesthetic, and make changes to help generate more revenue.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The team takes on a rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their camp; with five decades of memories to honor and a vision for a larger space, the crew battles freezing temperatures and a ticking clock to finish the cabin in time.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: Lindsey Kurowski takes her expertise to Guerneville, CA to help the owner of a rustic cabin motel that hasn't been updated in decades; she'll create an overall aesthetic, and make changes to help generate more revenue.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Weston, West Virginia to teach two young carpenter apprentices how to build a timber frame barn; along the way a 4H camper returns to the site to check out the cabin he and his fellow campers built with the guys.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders restore a timber frame home on a frozen field in West Virginia; Mark and Johnny visit an extraordinary mountain top retreat with a log home and timber frame pool house; Alex Webb builds a lord's table and bench at his workshop.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders have a whole lot of fun in Abingdon, Va, while saving an old barn, the guys explore the local history as they work with a master craftsman, operate an old sawmill, explore a restored cabin, and even drive an antique tractor.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew helps a couple turn their chopped up, suburban cabin into the spacious, rustic Maine getaway they've always wanted; with the help of some new faces and upgraded equipment, the Cabin Masters breathe new life into this family's retreat.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Married for 16 years with two children, Mike and Linda are looking for a lakefront property to call a family home; they are real estate investors and are looking for a property that is a good investment.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Active retirees Shirley and Chris are having their adult children and grandchildren move back home; they are looking for a large lakefront home for their entire family to live together all under one roof.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: James, Cristina and their children pack up and leave city life behind; they find a modern home with resort-inspired outdoor space, including a pool with a swim-up bar, as well as an elegant heritage home with a cobblestone driveway.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rachel and Tony are making a huge change in their lives; after getting a new lease on life, the adventurous couple decides to purchase a lakefront property that makes the two of them feel like they are always on vacation.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Real estate agent Diana and pharmaceutical industry representative Laith have traveled the world and now wish to settle down in a home on a lake; the tables are turned, as Diana will now be a buyer when she and Laith look at three unique properties.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Active retirees Shirley and Chris are having their adult children and grandchildren move back home; they are looking for a large lakefront home for their entire family to live together all under one roof.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: James, Cristina and their children pack up and leave city life behind; they find a modern home with resort-inspired outdoor space, including a pool with a swim-up bar, as well as an elegant heritage home with a cobblestone driveway.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rachel and Tony are making a huge change in their lives; after getting a new lease on life, the adventurous couple decides to purchase a lakefront property that makes the two of them feel like they are always on vacation.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Real estate agent Diana and pharmaceutical industry representative Laith have traveled the world and now wish to settle down in a home on a lake; the tables are turned, as Diana will now be a buyer when she and Laith look at three unique properties.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Active retirees Shirley and Chris are having their adult children and grandchildren move back home; they are looking for a large lakefront home for their entire family to live together all under one roof.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: James, Cristina and their children pack up and leave city life behind; they find a modern home with resort-inspired outdoor space, including a pool with a swim-up bar, as well as an elegant heritage home with a cobblestone driveway.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rachel and Tony are making a huge change in their lives; after getting a new lease on life, the adventurous couple decides to purchase a lakefront property that makes the two of them feel like they are always on vacation.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Real estate agent Diana and pharmaceutical industry representative Laith have traveled the world and now wish to settle down in a home on a lake; the tables are turned, as Diana will now be a buyer when she and Laith look at three unique properties.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.sub-title: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a Kansas City shirtwaist house that has only one bathroom; she doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Home for Family on Matagorda Bay in Texas
programme.desc: An engineer buys a home along the shores of Matagorda Bay in Texas, where he's vacationed with his family for years; he'll renovate the home for himself and his adult daughters so they can spend time fishing and relaxing together.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Serene Couples Retreat in Myrtle Beach, SC
programme.desc: A hardworking couple dreams of escaping Colorado's cold to find the perfect beachfront condominium; they use their real estate and remodeling skills to secure their own slice of paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Busy Parents Find Their Seaside Sanctuary in Murrells Inlet, SC
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania couple pursues their dream of owning a condominium on the beach; with two young daughters growing up quickly, they hope to provide them with lasting childhood memories by renovating an older unit with potential.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovations for Future Vacations in Virginia Beach
programme.desc: Having both spent their formative years on the beach, a Virginia couple is looking to pass this tradition down to their kids; they're hoping to find a reasonably priced condo in Virginia Beach that they can renovate into a coastal weekend escape.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Couple Fulfills Their Dream of Moving to Cape Cod, MA Full-Time
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple buys an outdated beach house and lives there while completely gutting and renovating it into a dream home; they aim to fulfill their dream of having a waterfront property and living year-round on Cape Cod.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: From Renters to Owners in Apalachee Bay, Florida
programme.desc: After selling their farm in South Carolina, a couple retreats to Florida's beaches; they are ready to stop renting and buy a fixer-upper by the water, where they can create their dream home.

programme.title: Design Down Under
programme.desc: Clients seek out Georgia and Richie to revamp their dated mountain home into a moody masterpiece; inspired by their clients' travels, Georgia and Richie incorporate color and functionality into their new home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Young Family Seeks Cozy Beach Hideaway in Emerald Isle
programme.desc: A Virginia couple is excited to finally pursue their dreams of owning a beach home in Emerald Isle, North Carolina. With their sons growing up quickly, they hope to build unforgettable memories by renovating a property with both personality and potential.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovations on First Home in Madeira Beach, Florida
programme.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programme.title: Design Down Under
programme.desc: Clients seek out Georgia and Richie to revamp their dated mountain home into a moody masterpiece; inspired by their clients' travels, Georgia and Richie incorporate color and functionality into their new home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Young Family Seeks Cozy Beach Hideaway in Emerald Isle
programme.desc: A Virginia couple is excited to finally pursue their dreams of owning a beach home in Emerald Isle, North Carolina. With their sons growing up quickly, they hope to build unforgettable memories by renovating a property with both personality and potential.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovations on First Home in Madeira Beach, Florida
programme.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Young Family Seeks Cozy Beach Hideaway in Emerald Isle
programme.desc: A Virginia couple is excited to finally pursue their dreams of owning a beach home in Emerald Isle, North Carolina. With their sons growing up quickly, they hope to build unforgettable memories by renovating a property with both personality and potential.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Home for Family on Matagorda Bay in Texas
programme.desc: An engineer buys a home along the shores of Matagorda Bay in Texas, where he's vacationed with his family for years; he'll renovate the home for himself and his adult daughters so they can spend time fishing and relaxing together.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Serene Couples Retreat in Myrtle Beach, SC
programme.desc: A hardworking couple dreams of escaping Colorado's cold to find the perfect beachfront condominium; they use their real estate and remodeling skills to secure their own slice of paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Busy Parents Find Their Seaside Sanctuary in Murrells Inlet, SC
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania couple pursues their dream of owning a condominium on the beach; with two young daughters growing up quickly, they hope to provide them with lasting childhood memories by renovating an older unit with potential.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovations on First Home in Madeira Beach, Florida
programme.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rick and Kerri sell their home and smaller lake house in order to purchase a large lake house they can live in full-time; they see a modern home situated high above the trees, a 10,000 sq ft home with soaring ceilings and a more traditional home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rick and Kerri sell their home and smaller lake house in order to purchase a large lake house they can live in full-time; they see a modern home situated high above the trees, a 10,000 sq ft home with soaring ceilings and a more traditional home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Rick and Kerri sell their home and smaller lake house in order to purchase a large lake house they can live in full-time; they see a modern home situated high above the trees, a 10,000 sq ft home with soaring ceilings and a more traditional home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Wealth management consultant Curtis and dance studio owner Emma wish for a serene life by the water; they find a modern retreat on a quiet canal, featuring a contemporary home with an amazing outdoor cabana space.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Ken and Georgia, have worked hard their entire lives and are now looking to reap the benefits of their hard work with a lakefront dream home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands seizes the opportunity to build his own getaway in Hawaii that features a luxurious outdoor bath area and detached, starlit master bedroom; however, volcanic eruptions threaten to send the entire project up in smoke.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their forever home in San Antonio, Texas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home; they have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family in Maui, Hawaii and, to keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but some setbacks test their limits at every turn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Naturalist builder Cat Taylor builds a remote sanctuary in the piney woods of Northwest Texas; she builds the two-story house using a cob mixture and adds touches of comfort to entertain family members.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Professional tree-house builder Michael "Murph" Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington; he enlists his friends to create natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex create a one-of-a-kind escape by anchoring a sailboat into the South Dakota earth and crafting a three-sided dock for their landlocked boat-loving clients; it's a dry-docked dream with sunset views and zero waves.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: Historic Granary Becomes a Goat Milk Goods Haven
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex relocate and restore a 120-year-old granary, transforming it into a rustic-yet-functional retail space for goat milk-based products -- honoring their clients' expanding farm with personal touches and plenty of space to grow.

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: A couple needs help transforming their backyard patio and their dark, dated Tiki room into a bright, beautiful area to hang out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Capturing Home
programme.desc: Their kids finally moved out, and a couple is ready to reclaim their home; they enlist Kate and Amy to help transform their dated family house into a functional, modern dwelling where they can entertain and relish their retirement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex create a one-of-a-kind escape by anchoring a sailboat into the South Dakota earth and crafting a three-sided dock for their landlocked boat-loving clients; it's a dry-docked dream with sunset views and zero waves.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines
programme.sub-title: Historic Granary Becomes a Goat Milk Goods Haven
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex relocate and restore a 120-year-old granary, transforming it into a rustic-yet-functional retail space for goat milk-based products -- honoring their clients' expanding farm with personal touches and plenty of space to grow.
